arts.ttl: Dimarco rejects Manchester United, commits future to Inter
arts.sum: Federico Dimarco, Inter Milan's star left-back, has once again demonstrated his unwavering loyalty to the Nerazzurri by rejecting advances from Manchester United. The Italian international, known for his passionate support of Inter, seems determined to cement his status as a club legend rather than pursue opportunities elsewhere. arts.ttl: Udinese’s Runjaic: “Sanchez against Inter? He could even start”
arts.sum: Udinese coach Kosta Runjaic addressed the media during the club’s Christmas toast, discussing his team’s journey so far and focusing on tomorrow night’s Coppa Italia round of 16 match against Inter. The manager indicated that he doesn’t intend to make too many changes to the lineup, but hinted at a possible surprise in the starting eleven.
